title: The Arrogance Misconception — Or Why Passion Reads As Pride
summary: On being misread by people who mistake intensity for ego.
content: Intensity can look like arrogance from a distance. This note explores why conviction, focus, and emotional investment are often interpreted as ego.

title: Why Every Economics Student Should Read More Novels
summary: And why every novelist should take one econometrics course.
content: Economics sharpens your model of incentives. Fiction sharpens your model of people. You need both.
